summary: Enterprise-grade LMS applications on Angular 21 in an Nx monorepo with SSR, SignalR realtime, RBAC, and bilingual RTL support for multi-tenant systems.
bullets: Engineered enterprise-grade LMS applications using Angular 21 within Nx monorepo architecture with SSR capabilities, supporting multiple applications and scalable modular development.
Developed reusable configuration-driven modules and dynamic CRUD systems to accelerate delivery across scalable enterprise workflows.
Implemented real-time features using SignalR, RxJS, and Angular Signals for multi-tenant systems.
Built RBAC systems, authentication/authorization layers, multilingual RTL (Arabic/English) support, reusable data tables, and dynamic forms.
Applied Clean Architecture, SOLID principles, and modern Angular patterns (Standalone Components, Signals, Functional Guards) for maintainability and high code quality.
Optimized frontend performance through lazy loading, caching strategies, HTTP interceptors, and scalable rendering techniques.
Integrated REST APIs, file uploads, data visualization (Chart.js, FullCalendar), and export utilities (Excel, PDF, CSV).
Delivered responsive, accessible UIs using PrimeNG, TailwindCSS, and a custom design system aligned with product requirements.

summary: Modular Angular applications using scalable frontend architecture and reusable UI engineering practices.
bullets: Built modular Angular applications using scalable frontend architecture and reusable UI engineering practices.
Improved page-load speed by 40% using lazy loading, code splitting, and image optimization.
Implemented RESTful API integrations that reduced response latency by 30%.
Collaborated in Agile sprints with backend and UX teams through Jira and Slack.
Conducted code reviews and enforced ESLint / Prettier standards, decreasing bugs by 20%.

summary: Mentored MEARN Stack trainees on Angular, React, TypeScript, and modern frontend engineering.
bullets: Delivered technical sessions covering Angular, React, TypeScript, and modern frontend engineering concepts.
Mentored trainees through scalable frontend architecture and API integration practices.
Evaluated and refactored student code for scalability and performance, improving project success rate by 35%.
Introduced Agile Scrum practices and Git workflows, enhancing team collaboration and delivery efficiency.

summary: Extended and optimized ERP modules using Python on the Odoo Framework.
bullets: Extended and optimized ERP modules using Python (Odoo Framework), boosting efficiency by 25%.
Refactored legacy OOP modules to enhance maintainability and reduce errors by 15%.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver customized business solutions on time.
